creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I checked. Poudriere log: http://poudriere.uzsolt.hu/amd64-default/2015-10-19_19h09m38s/logs/zathura-pdf-mupdf-0.2.7_3.log
The openjpeg and jbig2dec will install as dependencies of mupdf which is only build-dependency of zathura-pdf-mupdf.

I think should add jbig2dec and openjpeg as LIB_DEPENDS.

Patch added.
